name: task_create
description: Create a new task card. Recurring if `interval` is set (seconds between runs); one-shot otherwise. Use for work the agent wants to pick up later or on a schedule.

name.description: Task name. Must be unique within the session; used as the JSON filename in core/tasks/.

description.description: What this task should do when it fires.

interval.description: Recurring interval in seconds (must be > 0). Omit or set null for a one-shot task.

start_at.description: Earliest fire time (unix epoch seconds). Omit for the default (recurring: created + interval; one-shot: immediately).

end_at.description: Auto-expire time (unix epoch seconds). Omit for the default (created + 7 days, or 10*interval if interval > 7 days).
